flashcards.definition: A variable that takes a countable number of distinct numerical values based on random outcomes.
A table or function listing all possible values of a random variable and their probabilities, summing to 1.
The long-run average of a random variable: E(X) = Σ[x · P(X=x)].
σ² = Σ[(x − μ)² · P(X = x)]; measures spread of a probability distribution.
All probabilities must be between 0 and 1, and the sum of all probabilities must equal 1.
